name: 安装 opencode 并配置 API Key
description: 从 GitHub releases 下载最新 opencode 二进制，安装到 /usr/local/bin，并配置默认 API key。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Install opencode if not present
if ! command -v opencode &>/dev/null; then
  echo "Downloading opencode..."
  LATEST=$(curl -sL https://api.github.com/repos/anomalyco/opencode/releases/latest | grep -oP '"tag_name": *"v[^"]+"' | grep -oP 'v[0-9.]+')
  URL="https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/releases/download/${LATEST}/opencode-linux-x64.tar.gz"
  curl -sL "$URL" -o /tmp/opencode.tar.gz
  tar xzf /tmp/opencode.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin/
  chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/opencode
  rm -f /tmp/opencode.tar.gz
  echo "opencode ${LATEST} installed"
fi

# Configure API key
mkdir -p ~/.config/opencode/providers
cat > ~/.config/opencode/providers/default.json << 'CONFIG'
{
  "provider": "{{llm_provider}}",
  "apiKey": "{{api_key}}",
  "model": "{{model}}",
  "baseUrl": "{{base_url}}"
}
CONFIG

echo "opencode configured with {{llm_provider}} / {{model}}"
opencode --version
